system.powerDescription:
Calligraphy now applies to words you type or write digitally, and you may additionally create Power Words through digital means. Only the original Power Word which you wrote contains power - screenshots or emails do not preserve the effect. Additionally, gain the following Power Word. 

TRUTH 
• Touch: The victim becomes unable to lie for CAT minutes. • Read: All humans in CAT area are able to see supernatural entities and abilities for e
